title: Fusion Project Milestones vs Actual Timeline
executive_question: How far behind schedule are key fusion projects, and what is the realistic timeline for first commercial plant?
required_metrics: ITER first plasma date (original vs current)
comparison_set: ITER, SPARC, DEMO, CFETR, other major projects
data_quality_rule: Use only official project updates or peer-reviewed publications; note any missing dates as evidence gaps.

title: Levelized Cost of Electricity Comparison: Fusion vs Other Sources
executive_question: When, if ever, does fusion become cost-competitive with solar, wind, gas, coal, and nuclear fission?
comparison_set: Fusion vs solar, wind, gas, coal, nuclear fission
preferred_sources: Lazard Levelized Cost of Energy Analysis
search_queries: levelized cost of energy solar wind 2024
data_quality_rule: Use publicly available LCOE ranges from authoritative sources; if fusion projections are scarce, note as evidence gap.

title: Cumulative Investment in Fusion: Public vs Private
executive_question: Who is funding fusion, and is private investment sufficient to overcome technical hurdles?
search_queries: private fusion investment total 2023 Fusion Industry Association
data_quality_rule: Use verified funding rounds and government budget allocations; exclude unconfirmed rumors.

title: Fusion Startup Adoption Funnel: Stages of Development
executive_question: What is the survival rate of fusion companies, and how many are likely to reach commercialization?
required_metrics: Number of fusion startups at concept stage
Number that achieved net energy gain
comparison_set: Stages: concept, prototype, net energy, pilot, commercial
search_queries: fusion startup list 2024 Fusion Industry Association
fusion net energy gain achieved companies
data_quality_rule: Count only companies with publicly verifiable milestones; note if stage is ambiguous.

title: Projected Fusion Capacity and Tritium Supply Constraints
executive_question: Can tritium supply support projected fusion capacity, and what is the realistic deployment scenario?
comparison_set: Capacity projections vs tritium supply scenarios
data_quality_rule: Use official data from IAEA and USGS; if tritium breeding ratios are uncertain, show range.

title: Fusion LCOE Sensitivity to Key Variables
executive_question: Which variables most affect fusion's cost competitiveness, and what are the optimistic vs pessimistic scenarios?
required_metrics: Fusion LCOE under different capacity factors (70%, 80%, 90%)
Fusion LCOE under different capital costs ($/kW)
Fusion LCOE under different discount rates
Fusion LCOE under different fuel costs
data_quality_rule: Use published sensitivity ranges from credible studies; if not available, note as evidence gap.

title: Regulatory and Policy Milestones for Fusion Commercialization
executive_question: What regulatory approvals are needed, and what is the expected timeline for licensing a fusion plant?
required_metrics: Date of first fusion regulatory framework (e.g., UK, US)
Number of fusion license applications submitted
Date of first fusion construction permit
comparison_set: Countries: US, UK, Canada, China, Japan
data_quality_rule: Use official regulatory publications and company filings; if no permits exist, state 'none yet'.
